case_title: MICHAEL R. JOHNSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. (REQUEST WAS ALREADY GRANTED ON SAME DAY). FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MICHAEL R.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY JOHNSON, MICHAEL R. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
PROOF OF SERVICE ON OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MICHAEL R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MICHAEL R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEFENDANT CCSF IS IMMUNE FROM LIABILITY UNDER GOV'T CODE 820.4 &815.2(B) AS THEY WERE ENFORCING THE LAW. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT HE PRESENTED PROOF OF REGISTRATION AND PAID FEES PRIOR TO SALE DATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING IN FRONT OF JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL FILED BY JOHNSON, MICHAEL R. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE SAMUEL FENG. COPY MAILED TO PARIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
